blocks.body: Nouns, articles and quantity is the section where you learn how English handles noun forms, articles, and quantity expressions: singular/plural, countable/uncountable, a/an/the, some/any, much/many, few/little, and related topics.

{ "title": "What the learner should be able to do after this section", "items": [ "form regular plural forms: -s, -es, -ies, -ves;", "recognize and remember irregular plurals;", "distinguish countable and uncountable nouns;", "choose a / an / the / zero article correctly;", "use some / any / much / many / few / little without typical mistakes;", "see the connection between noun form, article, and quantity word inside one sentence." ] }
